metadata.disclaimer: This dataset is a best-effort enrichment for job-search comparison. Official recruiting pages and public filings/IR aggregations are preferred; review-site/secondary values are explicitly labeled and should not be treated as official compensation.

fieldDefinitions.salary.newGraduate: New graduate starting salary or initial compensation. annualJpyMin/Max are direct annual figures when disclosed or monthly*12 when only monthly base is known; bonus handling differs by company.
fieldDefinitions.salary.averageAnnualSalary: Average annual salary. For listed companies, this usually refers to the submitting company/non-consolidated employee average from public filing aggregations. For private companies, it is usually not disclosed.
fieldDefinitions.salary.averageTenureYears: Average tenure in years where available. For private companies this is often not disclosed.
fieldDefinitions.sourceLinks.reliability: official, official_partial, official_older, official_filing, secondary, review.

criteria.description: Evidence that the candidate can work with the stack and engineering problems implied by the hiring content.
Evidence that the candidate can explain work clearly in the communication environment expected by the company.
Evidence that the candidate works effectively with product, design, and engineering peers in the company operating style.
Evidence that the candidate understands the company values, user expectations, and mission context behind the role.
Evidence that the candidate can point to concrete work samples, shipped outcomes, or repeatable execution habits.

companies.rubricSummary: AnyMind Group appears to prioritize Go, Speed, Transparency when reviewing developer candidates.

notes: 公式新卒採用ページの2027/2028年度選考情報。賞与・インセンティブ等は別条件。

averageAnnualSalary.amountText: 公式の平均年間給与は確認不可
notes: 上場会社だが、提出会社単体の平均年間給与データは公開データ上で確認できず。
IRBankの従業員数推移ページでは2024年12月時点の平均勤続年数4.2年。

dataQualityNotes: newGraduate는 가능한 한 공식 채용/보도자료를 우선했습니다.
averageAnnualSalary와 averageTenureYears는 상장사만 비교적 공식성이 있고, 비상장사는 대부분 not_disclosed 또는 review_site/secondary입니다.
월급에는 고정잔업수당이 포함된 경우가 많으므로 실수령·근무강도 비교에는 별도 확인이 필요합니다.
